description_long: This is a modern two-story house situated on a rectangular plot with a well-maintained lawn and landscaping. The house features a flat, gray-tiled roof and a light-colored facade with large windows, providing ample natural light. At the front, there is a double carport with a paved driveway and a main entrance flanked by shrubs and decorative trees. The backyard includes a swimming pool with a geometric shape, a patio area, and a cylindrical water tank. The property is bordered by a low curb and includes several ornamental trees and bushes, enhancing its suburban appeal. The overall design is clean and functional, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and contemporary architectural lines.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a double carport, and a backyard pool, set on a landscaped rectangular lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double carport, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, side patio, and the cylindrical water tank at the rear corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full backyard, pool, patio, water tank, and additional landscaping elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear driveway, water tank, and side landscaping with trees and bushes.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with a small overhang, flanked by shrubs and accessed via a paved walkway, adjacent to a double carport.
